"'''How to Get Banned (Have a Mind)'''" was a [[Music/Legends|song]] featured in the album ''[[Advanced Explosives Handbook]]'' by [[Deeply Religious]], a [[rock music]] group known for their fast, cynical songs that disregarded the laws of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="GG9" /> The song was released at some point prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] between the Empire and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="Time" /> Due to the band's disregard for Imperial law in their music, the [[Imperial Board of Culture]] banned the song and its album, although copies of it could still be found on the [[Black market/Legends|black market]].<ref name="GG9" />

==Behind the scenes==
"How to Get Banned (Have a Mind)" was mentioned in ''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'', a [[1993]] sourcebook written by [[Simon Smith]] and [[Eric S. Trautmann|Eric Trautmann]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="GG9" />
